tool_design.role_in_intervention: Management review layer for whether the daily monitoring system is holding.
tool_design.expected_output: Completed monthly compliance scorecard with actions and maintenance flags

prevention: Require an action or no-action decision

content:
# Monthly Temperature Compliance Dashboard

**Tool ID:** T001-04  
**Block:** B001 (Daily Temperature Monitoring)  
**Domain:** Food Safety & Hygiene (D01_food_safety)  
**Level:** L3  
**Format:** Dashboard  
**Role:** Owner / Manager  
**Time Required:** 15-20 minutes monthly  
**Version:** 2.0

---
## What This Tool Is For

Use this dashboard to turn daily sheets into a management picture.

`B001` is not complete when checks are merely filled in. It becomes a real system when leadership can see:
- completion rate
- missed checks
- recurring unit drift
- calibration compliance
- number of triggered corrective records
- whether the team is inspection-ready right now

---
## Monthly Scorecard

**Month:** ____________________  
**Reviewer:** ____________________

| KPI | Target | Actual | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Scheduled daily checks completed | `100%` | | Green / Amber / Red | |
| Missed checks closed same day | `100%` | | Green / Amber / Red | |
| Probe calibration completed on time | `100%` | | Green / Amber / Red | |
| Out-of-range events logged properly | `100%` | | Green / Amber / Red | |
| Units with repeat warning trends | `0` | | Green / Amber / Red | |

---
## By-Unit Trend Review

| Unit | Avg Opening Temp | Avg Afternoon Temp | High Reading Count | Trigger Log Opened? | Maintenance Flag |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Milk fridge | | | | Yes / No | Yes / No |
| Prep fridge | | | | Yes / No | Yes / No |
| Display fridge | | | | Yes / No | Yes / No |
| Back-up fridge / walk-in | | | | Yes / No | Yes / No |
| Main freezer | | | | Yes / No | Yes / No |
| Other | | | | Yes / No | Yes / No |

---
## Compliance Snapshot

| Area Reviewed | Result | Action Needed |
|---|---|---|
| Daily sheets filed correctly | Pass / Fail | |
| Manager countersign present | Pass / Fail | |
| Calibration tracker up to date | Pass / Fail | |
| Trigger logs complete where needed | Pass / Fail | |
| Team knows safe limits when asked | Pass / Fail | |

---
## Action Register

| Priority | Action | Owner | Due Date | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| High / Medium / Low | | | | Open / Closed |
| High / Medium / Low | | | | Open / Closed |
| High / Medium / Low | | | | Open / Closed |
| High / Medium / Low | | | | Open / Closed |

---
## Manager Review Prompts

- Which unit is drifting before failure?
- Are afternoon checks weaker than opening checks?
- Is one shift or day more likely to miss records?
- Are staff logging actions properly when numbers go high?
- Does any repeated issue actually belong in maintenance, training, or cold chain redesign?

---
## Share With The Team

Post a simplified monthly message in the staff area:
- compliance rate
- days since last missed check
- any unit to watch
- one improvement action for the next month

That keeps temperature monitoring visible without drowning the team in paperwork.

---
## Connected Resources

**Built from:**
- T001-01 - Daily Temperature Log & Check Sheet
- T001-02 - Probe Calibration Record & Accuracy Tracker
- T001-03 - Temperature Excursion Trigger Log

**Supports:**
- T001-05 - Temperature Monitoring SOP & Team Sign-Off
- B003 - Temperature Excursion Response

---

*Tool Version 2.0 - the manager view that turns checks into control.*
